# Follicle Intelligence

> Follicle Intelligence is an enterprise operating system for hair restoration clinics—connecting acquisition, clinical operations, surgery, independent audit, workforce training, finance, and longitudinal outcome intelligence in one governed platform.

Canonical site: https://www.follicleintelligence.ai

## What we are

- Category: Enterprise clinical / surgical operating system for hair restoration
- Audience: Surgeons, clinic owners, multi-site groups, training partners, institutional collaborators
- Product: Follicle Intelligence Platform (FI OS) — modular OS modules on a shared Patient Twin intelligence substrate

## Ecosystem (sister brands)

- HairAudit — surgical evidence, independent review, and quality scoring: https://hairaudit.com
- Hair Longevity Institute — biology and longitudinal treatment intelligence: https://hairlongevityinstitute.com
- International Institute of Hair Restoration — training, certification, and standards: https://iiohr.com

- Home: https://www.follicleintelligence.ai/

- Book demo: https://www.follicleintelligence.ai/demo
- Contact: https://www.follicleintelligence.ai/contact

## Platform modules

- Ecosystem architecture: https://www.follicleintelligence.ai/platform/ecosystem
- Platform progress (public delivery status): https://www.follicleintelligence.ai/platform/progress
- LeadFlow (acquisition & CRM): https://www.follicleintelligence.ai/platform/leadflow
- ClinicOS (scheduling & operations): https://www.follicleintelligence.ai/platform/clinic-os
- PatientOS (Patient Twin & records): https://www.follicleintelligence.ai/platform/patient-os
- ImagingOS (clinical imaging): https://www.follicleintelligence.ai/platform/imaging-os
- SurgeryOS (surgical workflow): https://www.follicleintelligence.ai/platform/surgery-os
- AnalyticsOS (business intelligence): https://www.follicleintelligence.ai/platform/analytics-os
